name: astryx-svelte

scripts.build:svelte: pnpm -F @astryxdesign/tokens build && pnpm -F @astryxdesign/svelte package && pnpm -F @astryxdesign/svelte-lab check && pnpm -F @astryxdesign/svelte-vega build
scripts.check:svelte: pnpm -F @astryxdesign/tokens build && pnpm -F @astryxdesign/svelte check && pnpm -F @astryxdesign/svelte package && pnpm -F @astryxdesign/svelte-lab check && pnpm -F @astryxdesign/svelte-vega check
scripts.check:package-boundaries:fixtures: tmp="${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/astryx-svelte-lab-boundary.log"; node scripts/check-package-boundaries.js --fixture internal/fixtures/svelte-lab-publishable.package.json > "$tmp" 2>&1; rc=$?; cat "$tmp"; grep -F "@astryxdesign/svelte-lab must stay private/non-publishable" "$tmp"; grep_rc=$?; rm -f "$tmp"; test "$rc" -ne 0 && test "$grep_rc" -eq 0
scripts.check:repo: pnpm check:svelte && pnpm check:svelte:parity && pnpm check:package-boundaries && pnpm check:package-boundaries:fixtures && pnpm check:changesets && pnpm check:demo-media
scripts.test: pnpm -F @astryxdesign/svelte test && pnpm -F @astryxdesign/svelte-lab test && pnpm -F @astryxdesign/svelte-vega test && pnpm exec vitest run scripts/check-svelte-port-parity.test.ts

description: Svelte 5 + Tailwind implementation of the Astryx design system, including CLI, docs metadata, examples, and AI agent support.
